title: Sunday Endurance at Skov (optional)
objective: Optional, non-debt aerobic ride to enjoy the cottage roads if - and only if - the legs and back have recovered from Friday's long ride.
why_now: With both bikes at Skov and a quiet Sunday, easy frequency is welcome, but Friday's 4-5h ride is the week's real load. This ride is discretionary: it adds aerobic time when recovery is good and is dropped without a second thought when it is not.

source_context.week_objective: Re-entry and aerobic rebuild after a disrupted, manual-labor weekend

targets.notes: Optional. Up to 90 min easy endurance at 56-68% FTP. Gravel or road, by feel. Cap the climbs; this is aerobic enjoyment, not training. Skip with zero guilt if the legs/back are not fully recovered - it creates no debt.

warmup.notes: Start easy and read the legs/back from Friday before committing to the full hour and a half.

steps.notes: Easy aerobic on the cottage roads. Full sentences, low force on climbs, soft-pedal descents. Turn for home whenever you have had enough.

nutrition.pre: Normal cottage breakfast; add 20-30g carbs if hungry.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst; a small carb top-up if you go the full 90 min.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Left-calf routine, hydrate, easy cottage day.
recovery.evening: Set up the week ahead with good sleep.
recovery.next_morning_check: Monday June 29 opens Week 5; with this week's added volume from the long Friday, Week 5 should lean recovery-biased rather than the originally planned overload - reassess from how this week absorbed.

skill_focus.action: Keep it genuinely easy - no climbs pushed, no segments chased.
skill_focus.why: Optional volume only helps if it stays aerobic; pushing it would eat into recovery from the long ride and the start of next week.

mental_focus.why: This ride is a bonus, not a box to tick; recovery from Friday matters more than the extra hour.
mental_focus.reset: If you feel flat in the first 15 min, turn around - that is the right call, not a failure.

pre_interval_cues: Optional - only ride if legs and back are recovered.
Easy aerobic, no debt if skipped.
during_workout_cues: Stop when you have had enough.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Perfect - keep it easy and enjoy the roads.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Turn for home; rest is the better training choice today.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Either an easy enjoyable hour-ish, or a guilt-free rest day - both are wins.
